user.title: Connect to Suno
user.description:
Enter your Suno session token.  To get it:

1. Open suno.com and log in
2. Press F12 to open DevTools
3. Go to Application > Cookies > suno.com
4. Find __client and copy its value (starts with eyJ...)

data_description.cookie: The __client cookie value from suno.com.  Starts with eyJ.  Valid for approximately 2 years.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate with Suno
reauth_confirm.description: Your Suno session has expired.  Follow the same steps to get a fresh token from suno.com.

data_description.cookie: The __client cookie value from suno.com.  Starts with eyJ.

error.invalid_cookie: Could not authenticate.  Check your cookie is correct and not expired.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to Suno.  Check your network connection.

abort.already_configured: This Suno account is already configured.

auth_failed.message: Authentication failed.  Check your Suno cookie is valid and not expired.

auth_expired.title: Suno authentication expired
auth_expired.description: Your Suno session cookie has expired.  Open the integration settings to re-authenticate.
